arts.ttl: Brighton suffer injury blow ahead of Wolves and Liverpool clashes
arts.sum: Brighton forward Danny Welbeck looks set for a spell on the sidelines after picking up an injury against Newcastle United on Saturday. The former Arsenal and Manchester United player scored the only goal of the game to give the Seagulls victory at St James’ Park. It was his 100th goal involvement (72 goals, 28 assists) […] The post Brighton suffer injury blow ahead of Wolves and Liverpool clashes first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Wolves
arts.sum: There was plenty of discussion over the manager's future during the recent break, but Guardiola will doubtlessly be solely focused on securing all three points on Sunday and the Spaniard will be thrilled that his squad returned from international duty injury-free. CB: Manuel Akanji - The stout Swiss defender often goes under the radar, but he's a key figure in this City backline and he should assume a starting role on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man United to 'battle with Man City for in-demand manager'... with Red Devils 'keen to be prepared' if they sack Erik Ten Hag
arts.sum: United have endured their worst start to a season after seven games - winning just twice and scoring five goals - which has ramped up the pressure on Ten Hag again.

arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot looking to make Reds more "Man City-esque" after "basketball" approach of Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch tells Sports Mole that Arne Slot wants his side to be more "Man City-esque" in their control of games compared to Jurgen Klopp's approach.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Man Utd in contact with Man City’s dream Guardiola heir to replace Ten Hag
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, the Red Devils have already made contact with Sporting CP boss Ruben Amorim, who has been hailed as a natural heir to Guardiola at City. Manchester United are already in contact with numerous potential replacements for manager Erik ten Hag – but now the Red Devils are seeking to steal a sensational march on rivals Manchester City in the race for a coach lined up as Pep Guardiola’s successor.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says he would advise on Man City successor when he eventually leaves the club
arts.sum: The Catalan insists he is yet to make a decision on whether or not he will extend his stay into a 10th season at the Etihad Stadium.
